vocab.example: Like most kids, I had boundless energy, so I spent the majority of my time playing tag or football in the street.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng/thúc đẩy sự sáng tạo
vocab.example: My parents often gave me building blocks to foster creativity, and I would spend hours constructing miniature cities.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành nhân cách
vocab.example: During my formative years, my absolute favorite pastime was listening to my grandmother’s folk stories.
I enjoyed tinkering with old electronic gadgets to see how they worked, which sparked my interest in engineering.

vocab.meaning: những chuyến tham quan/dã ngoại ngoài trời
vocab.example: Weekend outdoor excursions to the countryside were the highlight of my childhood, especially catching fish in the creek.

vocab.meaning: trí tưởng tượng vô cùng phong phú
vocab.example: I had a vivid imagination, so I would often role-play as a brave knight defending a cardboard castle.

vocab.meaning: sự nhanh nhẹn về thể chất
vocab.example: Gymnastics helped me develop great physical agility, and I loved practicing cartwheels in the backyard.

vocab.meaning: sự tiếp cận thoải mái, không bị hạn chế
vocab.example: Having unfettered access to the local library meant that my favorite activity was getting lost in adventure novels.
Team sports provided a great platform for social integration, helping me make lifelong friends at a very young age.

vocab.meaning: trò tiêu khiển được yêu mến, trân trọng
vocab.example: Stargazing with my father was a cherished pastime that ignited my lifelong fascination with the cosmos.
